kept_terms: 12 de Octubre University Hospital Histopathological Dataset
AI Training Dataset (from previous pilot study)
Combined Kaggle Dataset (Nevus Classifier + Skin Lesion Analysis Toward Melanoma Detection)
Dermoscopic image dataset (referenced from Haenssle et al. 2018)
Ex vivo Confocal Microscopy (CM) and H&E stained skin tissue dataset
Gorlin Syndrome Patient Cohort (CHU de Marseille)
Histopathology image dataset for BCC diagnosis
Immune Checkpoint Inhibitor Pneumonitis (CIP) Prediction Cohorts
In vivo Raman and Dermoscopic Dataset (Samara)
In vivo Raman Spectroscopy Skin Lesion Dataset (University of British Columbia)
Javid Melanoma Dataset (Melanoma Skin Cancer Dataset of 10,000 Images)
Light Skin Color Cohort (Fitzpatrick types 1, 2, and 3)
Ninth People’s Hospital Affiliated to Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine Melanocytic Nevi Dataset
Ninth People’s Hospital Melanocytic Nevus Dataset
Public Dermatology Image Database (Diepgen et al 2014, Galderma 2014)
Seven dermoscopic image sets (Control and Scale Bar variants)
Severance Hospital and Dongsan Hospital Dermoscopy Dataset
Shenzhen Sixth People's Hospital Skin Biopsy Cohort
Skin of Color Cohort (Fitzpatrick types 4 and 5)
Stoecker and Associates Dermoscopy Image Collection
Sydney Melanoma Diagnostic Centre (SMDC) In-House Dataset
Synthetic Training Data for Data Purification Network
Test images of melanoma released with the publication
University of Queensland Diamantina Institute Dermatology Research Centre Dataset
